image.title: NASR Mahapatra, S Sahoo, B Dehury, V Raina, S Patro, N Misra, M Suar

item.title: Designing an efficient multi-epitope vaccine displaying interactions with diverse HLA molecules for an efficient humoral and cellular immune response to prevent COVID-19 infection.
